## [00:00 - 01:34]

So my background is that my website has attracted more than 30 million page views largely due to this tip. It does not matter what type of content we're talking about. Do not quit. I know it sounds too simple, but nearly everyone quits within the first year, if not the first month. Because it's hard and when you're not getting results, it's really difficult to remain motivated.
